nasb.text: the sons of Israel would see the face of Moses, that the skin of Moses’ face shone. So Moses would replace the veil over his face until he went in to speak with Him.

esv.text: the people of Israel would see the face of Moses, that the skin of Moses’ face was shining. And Moses would put the veil over his face again, until he went in to speak with him.

cnv.text: 以色列人看見摩西的臉，見他的臉皮發光。摩西再用帕子蒙上自己的臉，直到他進去和耶和華說話為止。

ccb.text: 百姓会看到他脸上发光，于是他再用帕子遮住脸，直到下次与耶和华说话的时候才揭开。
